sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, value Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT array_concat_agg(value) AS concatenated_values FROM test_table;
UPDATE test_table SET value = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_concat_agg(value) AS all_values FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
